definitions.text: One who makes observations, monitors or takes notice.
examples: Most impartial observers agreed that Sampras had not served well.

definitions.text: One who adheres or follows laws, guidelines, etc.
examples: I shall be an observer of the local customs.

definitions.text: A person sent as a representative, to a meeting or other function to monitor but not to participate.
examples: The UN sent many observers to the country's first elections.
